steps.description: Mount the short braces onto the base frame and secure them with a short push-fit pin, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.
Attach the long brace to the assembly, align it, and secure it with a short push-fit pin, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.
Install an additional short push-fit pin at the next fastening point with a tooth-lock washer and a hex nut.
Attach the wing beam and secure it in place with screw pins, a round washer, and an acorn nut.
Mount both wings and their wheels onto long pins and secure them with round washers, tooth-lock washers, and hex nuts.
Install the middle pin, mount a wheel and fit the pulley onto it, then secure with a round washer, a tooth-lock washer, and a hex nut.
